name: io.github.MetriLLM/metrillm
description: Benchmark local LLM models — speed, quality & hardware fitness verdict from any MCP client

environmentVariables.description: Supabase project URL for uploading results to the leaderboard
environmentVariables.name: METRILLM_SUPABASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Supabase anonymous key for uploading results
environmentVariables.name: METRILLM_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Base URL for public result pages
environmentVariables.name: METRILLM_PUBLIC_RESULT_BASE_URL
